chapters.title: Chapter One
chapters.summary: Mara arrives at the abandoned orchard and finds evidence that someone has been waiting for her.

scenes.title: The arrival
scenes.synopsis: Mara reaches the orchard at dusk.
scenes.content:
The orchard appeared at the end of the road just as the daylight began to thin.

Mara stopped at the rusted gate, one hand curled around the letter in her coat pocket.

scenes.title: A key in the soil
scenes.synopsis: A glint beneath the oldest tree catches Mara's attention.
scenes.content: This is the key in the soil part.

chapters.title: Chapter Two
chapters.summary: The farmhouse gives up its first secret.

characters.name: The Girl
characters.description: The girl who keeps showing up.

locations.name: The Glass Orchard
locations.description: An overgrown pear orchard surrounding a pale stone farmhouse. Locals claim the fruit once grew translucent after the first frost.
